promise_text: We will place Centre-State relations on an even keel through consultation.

We will launch 'National Mission on Himalayas'.
We will create a 'Himalayan Sustainability Fund'.
We will give due Importance to programmes devised to arrest the melting of Himalayan glaciers.

We will take State Governments into confidence for harnessing of these resources.

We will encourage value addition in all resources.

We will put a system in place for swift and fair trial of terror related cases.

We will encourage and strengthen NCC training at the college and University level.

We will take measures to make Short Service Commission more attractive.
We will set up the National Maritime Authority.
